data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for historical trends of pass/fail/remediation over time.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for a historical trend of pass/fail/remediation over time. However, the evidence provided does not include any records or data that explicitly demonstrate this trend. The prior steps focus on individual booking records and compliance checks without aggregating or analyzing the historical performance data needed to confirm the requirement.
gaps: Missing evidence records that show historical trends of pass/fail/remediation over time.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add historical trend analysis endpoint
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define an endpoint that retrieves historical data on pass/fail/remediation outcomes.
